title: 2018 Press Releases
summary: This source is a chronological listing/index page of Federal Reserve press releases from throughout 2018. It contains links to dozens of distinct announcements spanning multiple categories including monetary policy, banking regulation, enforcement actions, and administrative matters. As a navigation index rather than a specific document, it cannot be meaningfully archived as a single research note.
key_points: This is a listing page, not a single sourceable document—individual releases must be accessed via their specific URLs
The page contains releases from throughout 2018 (January through December), making the published_at date ambiguous
Releases span multiple categories: monetary policy statements, banking regulation, enforcement actions, application approvals, and administrative announcements

Notable 2018 items include: multiple FOMC statements, FOMC minutes, discount rate meeting minutes, stress test framework announcements, Volcker rule proposals, and enforcement actions against Société Générale ($81.3M)
The Federal Reserve announced plans in November 2018 to publish a semiannual financial stability assessment report
The page also includes non-monetary items such as the College Fed Challenge winners and the Janet L. Yellen Award announcement
why_it_matters: This index page serves as a navigation tool to access individual 2018 Fed communications but itself contains no substantive research content. Researchers seeking specific Fed documents from 2018 must retrieve individual press releases rather than this index. The content is approximately 8 years old and historical in nature.
notes: Non-archivable listing page. Contains index of 2018 Federal Reserve press releases but is not itself a sourceable document. Historical record (2018 vintage). Recommend accessing individual press release URLs for substantive content.
